series_metadata.series_title: Children's Trust Fund Report and Outreach
series_metadata.series_description: Reports sent to the Deputy Director which serve as asystematized overview of issues relating to the Children''s Trust Fund and CommunityBased Family Resource and Support programs. Report include information on servicesprovided, and progress made toward achievement of performance goals. Outreachincludes, but is not limited to: newsletters, biennial reports, legislative correspondenceas well as child abuse and neglect prevention month material and activities.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in office ; Paper: in office , thendestroy
